name: Ceasefire
text:
After {{owner}} activates a system that contains 1 or more of your units:
{{owner}} cannot move units into the active system.
Then, return this card to {{owner}}.

name: Political Secret
text:
When an agenda is revealed:
{{owner}} cannot vote, play action cards, or use faction abilities until after that agenda has been resolved.
Then, return this card to {{owner}}.

name: Support For The Throne
text:
When you receive this card, if you are not {{owner}}, you must play it faceup in your play area and gain 1 victory point.
If you activate a system that contains 1 or more of {{owner}}'s units, or if {{owner}} is eliminated, lose 1 victory point and return this card to {{owner}}.

name: Trade Agreement
text:
When {{owner}} replenishes commodities:
{{owner}} gives you all of his commodities.
Then, return this card to {{owner}}.

name: Alliance
text:
When you receive this card, if you are not {{owner}}, you must place it faceup in your play area.
While this card is in your play area, you can use {{owner}}'s commander ability, if unlocked.
If you activate a system that contains 1 or more of {{owner}}'s units, return this card to {{owner}}.
